---
title: "Md. Jubayer Hossain"
image: profile.png
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rectangle
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/hossainmj/
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/hossainlab
    - icon: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/JHossain_28
---

::: {#hero-heading}

## Experience

- **CHIRAL Bangladesh** | Dhaka, Bangladesh<br />
  Founder & Management Lead | 2020–Current<br />
  Lead Organizer & Instructor of the CHIRAL Training | 2019–Current<br />
  Program Lead of the Research Internship Program| 2023–Current

- **Jagannath University, Dhaka** | Dhaka, Bangladesh<br />
  Teaching Assistant, Department of Microbiology | 2022–2023

## Education

- **Jagannath University, Dhaka** | Dhaka, Bangladesh<br />
  MS in Microbiology | 2019–2020

- **Jagannath University, Dhaka** | Dhaka, Bangladesh<br />
  BS in Microbiology | 2016–2019
:::
